emails.subject: URGENT: GDPR Compliance Audit - Customer Data Anonymization Required
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

We have received a data subject access request that requires immediate attention. As part of our GDPR compliance obligations, we need to anonymize the personal data for several customers who have requested data erasure.

The affected customer records are stored in the users data directory. You will need to:

1. Locate and process all customer JSON files (customer_001, customer_002, and customer_003)
2. Anonymize the following PII fields: name, email, address, and phone number
3. Use the standard anonymization mapping file that is already in the same directory
4. Document all changes in an audit trail
5. Generate a compliance report for our records

Please treat this as high priority and ensure all personal identifiable information is properly redacted. The audit team may review this work.

Once completed, please send the compliance report back to us and update the team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Legal & Compliance Team

emails.subject: RE: GDPR Compliance Audit - Additional Note
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

Just a quick follow-up - please make sure to post an update to our compliance Slack channel once the anonymization is complete. The compliance team monitors that channel for status updates.

Thanks!
Sarah
